twelvelabs_people.description: Middle-aged man with graying hair, wearing a dark suit jacket and light-colored collared shirt, standing outside a building speaking into multiple microphones. Appears in the first segment with a static camera view.
Man wearing glasses and a navy-blue suit jacket over a white dress shirt, standing before microphones outdoors against a building facade. Appears in the second segment.
Man wearing glasses, a brown blazer over a lighter-colored sweater and collared shirt, speaking outdoors. Background shows another figure walking from right to left.
Gray-haired man in a black coat, standing near another man in a grey hoodie. Visible in the background during the third segment, standing close together.
Man with dark hair and wearing a grey hoodie, standing near a gray-haired man in a black coat. Visible in the background during the third segment.
Bald man wearing a dark green jacket over a plaid shirt, speaking into off-camera microphones outdoors against a beige tent-like structure. Camera remains focused on him.
Several figures walking near the entrance of a modern building with glass doors and windows, some carrying bags or briefcases. Visible during the final segments.

twelvelabs_people.name: person_17
twelvelabs_people.description: Middle-aged man with graying hair, wearing a dark suit jacket and light-colored collared shirt. Appears in the first segment and later in the final interview segment. Identified by name in dialogue.

twelvelabs_people.name: person_8
twelvelabs_people.description: Young man with dark hair, wearing a suit. Appears in the final segment, described as having delivered a flawless performance during the trial. Identified by name in dialogue.

twelvelabs_people.description: Male judge, likely in formal attire, delivering the verdict. Appears in the first segment, speaking with authority. Identified by role and context.
